title: Shrimp Skillet
description: A quick and flavorful skillet dish made with succulent shrimp, crunchy texture, and a hint of Mediterranean flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Stir in the greek yogurt, crunchy breadcrumbs, and skillet seasoning.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the shrimp hot, garnished with fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
